column.text:
• Detroit Tigers transferred SS Javier Báez to the 60-day injured list with a right ankle sprain.
• Philadelphia Phillies designated RHP Jackson Rutledge for assignment.
• Seattle Mariners designated RHP Domingo Gonzalez for assignment.
• Chicago White Sox traded RF Derek Hill to Philadelphia for CF Dylan Campbell and 2B Jose Colmenares.
• Los Angeles Angels signed free agent RHP Taijuan Walker to a minor league contract.
• Pittsburgh Pirates recalled OF Esmerlyn Valdez from Triple-A Indianapolis.
• New York Mets sent RHP Kodai Senga on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Binghamton.
• Athletics sent RHP Aaron Civale on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Las Vegas.
• Baltimore Orioles sent RHP Ryan Helsley on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Norfolk.
• Los Angeles Dodgers placed C Will Smith on the 10-day injured list with neck inflammation.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
